nasb.text: My lovingkindness I will keep for him forever, And My covenant shall be confirmed to him.

esv.text: My steadfast love I will keep for him forever, and my covenant will stand firm for him.

cnv.text: 我要永遠保持我對他的慈愛， 我和他所立的約必堅立。

ccb.text: 我要永远用慈爱待他， 我与他立的约永不更改。

csbs.text: 我要向他持守我的慈爱，直到永远； 我与他所立的约也必坚定。
